title: iridorkis scortechinii
intro: Iridorkis scortechinii, commonly known as the 'Tonguea', is a plant species from the family Iridaceae, native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of Iridorkis scortechinii include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its ability to exhibit antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Iridorkis scortechinii include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Iridorkis scortechinii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting, due to its high toxicity levels.
